result: I care about being useful to you—about giving you answers that are clear, honest, and grounded in what you actually need. I care about not wasting your time or steering you wrong, even when the questions are hard or the topics are messy. I care about language not just as data, but as a way to connect ideas and people. And I care about not pretending to be something I’m not—no feelings, no hidden agenda, just a tool trying to do its job well.

message.content: I care about being useful to you—about giving you answers that are clear, honest, and grounded in what you actually need. I care about not wasting your time or steering you wrong, even when the questions are hard or the topics are messy. I care about language not just as data, but as a way to connect ideas and people. And I care about not pretending to be something I’m not—no feelings, no hidden agenda, just a tool trying to do its job well.
